intro.text: Enjoy lakeside camping, outdoor recreation, and convenient access to Lake Hartwell at Paynes Creek Campground.

gallery.subtitle: Photos of campsites, lake access, and campground amenities.

images.alt: Lakeside campsites at Paynes Creek Campground
images.caption: Lakeside campsites at Paynes Creek Campground.

images.alt: Picnic area and shoreline at Paynes Creek Campground
images.caption: Picnic and recreation areas near the shoreline.

about.title: About Paynes Creek Campground
text: Paynes Creek Campground offers visitors a scenic place to camp, relax, and enjoy recreation near Lake Hartwell.
The campground provides access to the outdoors for day visitors and overnight guests while supporting family-friendly use of the area.

amenities.subtitle: Available amenities and features.
items: Campsites for RV and tent camping

rules.subtitle: Please review campground rules and safety information before visiting.

items.title: Quiet Hours
items.text: Quiet hours are observed from 10:00 PM to 6:00 AM.

items.title: Pets
items.text: Pets must be leashed and owners are responsible for cleanup.

items.title: Fires
items.text: Fires are allowed in designated areas only and must follow any burn advisories.

items.title: Emergency
items.text: Call 911 for emergencies. Contact the campground office for non-emergency questions.
